slides.title: Morning light *sets your whole day*.
slides.sub: Bright light early anchors your body clock. That ripples into your sleep, mood and energy.

slides.title: Light is the signal
slides.body: Your body clock takes its main cue from light. Morning brightness *tells it* the day has begun.

slides.title: Get bright light early
slides.body: Step outside soon after waking. Natural light is *far stronger* than anything indoors.

slides.title: It helps night sleep
slides.body: An early light cue *can help* set your sleep timer. Better mornings often mean easier nights.

slides.title: Ten minutes outside
slides.body: Even a short walk or coffee outdoors counts. Cloudy days *still deliver* plenty of light.

slides.title: Show up daily
slides.body: The same light at the same time keeps your clock steady. Consistency *does the quiet work*.

slides.title: Anchor your day in *light*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sleep, movement and steps that steady your rhythm, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The simplest sleep upgrade happens the moment you wake up. 🌿

Morning light anchors your body clock, which helps your mood, energy and night sleep. Ten minutes outside is enough, and consistency does the rest. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your daily rhythm into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How Morning Light Sets Your Sleep, Mood and Energy
